title: Renaming pack
description: This resource pack changes models/textures of items then they been renamed
body:
This resource pack will be useful for role plays and for players to costumize their armor, tools and food. Also it will be useful for role play servers

**IMPORTANT:
THIS RESOURCE PACK WAS MADE FOR FABRIC 1.20.1 AND MOST LIKELY WON'T WORK ON OPTIFINE and wasn't tested on forge. **


This description will be updated with new versions due to addition in new updates. 
-Rename item on the anvil :

Carved Pumpkin (winterhat) - new year hat, model attached picture is in gallery.

Carved Pumpkin (40th_years_hat) - hat of 40s, hat picture is in galley.
